case_title: XIANG XING LI VS. 101 CONSTRUCTION CO. INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, XIANG XING AS TO DEFENDANT 101 CONSTRUCTION CO. INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, XIANG XING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 101 CONSTRUCTION CO. INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $6,991.64 PRINCIPAL, $35.69 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,252.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
